title: paymentReducer.js — CLEARCARDS also clears paymentPlantDetails
commit_message: fix: reset subscription snapshot when user cards are cleared

why_payment_reducer_strict.explanation: Only paymentReducer.js changes. Selection includes every test in payment-state.cross.test.js whose sources[] includes paymentReducer.js or symbols[] includes paymentReducer, but excludes describes that only reference storage.ts/constants.ts (storageKeys alignment). That yields 10 tests: updateUserCards (3), updatePaymentPlanDetails (2), CLEARCARDS (2), CARD_NUMBER_REGEX checkout (3).
why_payment_reducer_strict.key_point: 10 CRITICAL + 0 HIGH + 67 SKIP = 77 — strict symbol-driven footprint without pulling storageKey-only rows.

CRITICAL.reason: sources[] or symbols[] tie to paymentReducer for these rows in test-manifest.json

tests.test: updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > populates userCards in state after dispatch
updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > sets cardsFetched to true when cards are provided
updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer > clears userCards when dispatched with an empty array
updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > stores the subscription plan object in paymentPlantDetails
updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer > does not mutate userCards when a plan update is dispatched
paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets userCards to an empty array
tests.result: ⚠️  MAY FAIL — test may need to expect paymentPlantDetails cleared too

tests.test: paymentActions.CLEARCARDS resets payment state > resets cardsFetched back to false after clearing
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > accepts a standard 19-character card number with spaces
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number shorter than 17 characters
CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input > rejects a card number that contains letters

HIGH.reason: No sibling describes in this file qualify as HIGH under the strict paymentReducer-only policy

SKIP.reason: Remaining tests do not list paymentReducer.js in sources[]
skipped_files: test_repository/cross-dependent/payment-state.cross.test.js (storageKeys align with payment flow expectations — sources: storage.ts, constants.ts only)

coverage_gaps.detail: Extend CLEARCARDS tests to assert paymentPlantDetails is null or {} after clear.

jest_run_command: npx jest --config test_repository/jest.config.js --no-coverage -t "updateUserCards action dispatched into paymentReducer|updatePaymentPlanDetails action and paymentReducer|paymentActions\.CLEARCARDS resets payment state|CARD_NUMBER_REGEX validates checkout flow input" --verbose
